basic_details.job_title: Mormugao Port Authority Media Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Mormugao Port Authority has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Media Coordinator Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 15-06-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication / Bachelor in Journalism or Mass Communication with P. G. Diploma in Media / Mass Communication / Journalism / Digital PR/ Social Media / Advertising / Public Relations OR Master of Arts in Mass Communication / Master in Journalism or Mass Communication. Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi is essential.
qualification.details: Media Coordinator: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Communication / Bachelor in Journalism or Mass Communication with P. G. Diploma in Media / Mass Communication / Journalism / Digital PR/ Social Media / Advertising / Public Relations OR Master of Arts in Mass Communication / Master in Journalism or Mass Communication. Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi is essential. Experience in Executive / Supervisory cadre in the above field for three years. Must be conversant with Social Media handles. Preference would be given to candidates having experience in Software like Protocol / Corol Freehand, etc. Must be thorough with feeding google sheets, Portal Updating, etc.

selection_process: Submission of applications Verification of eligibility criteria Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mormugao Port Authority Media Coordinator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: mptgoa.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mormugao Port Authority MEDIA COORDINATOR (ON CONTRACT) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the MEDIA COORDINATOR (ON CONTRACT) post is 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the MEDIA COORDINATOR (ON CONTRACT) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 70,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Mass Communication or Journalism, with specific P.G. Diploma requirements or equivalent. Knowledge of Konkani and Marathi is also essential.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the MEDIA COORDINATOR (ON CONTRACT) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the MEDIA COORDINATOR (ON CONTRACT) position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is GAD/PC.A/87/2026/.

faq.question: Q9. What experience is required for the MEDIA COORDINATOR (ON CONTRACT) role?
faq.answer: Candidates need at least three years of experience in an Executive or Supervisory cadre in the relevant field, and must be conversant with social media handles.

faq.question: Q10. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent to the Secretary, General Administration Department, Mormugao Port Authority, "SAARASI", 3rd Floor, Administrative Office Building, Headland Sada, Goa – 403 804.
